# freeswitch_gateway (Data Source)

Look up an existing gateway by profile and name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "freeswitch_gateway" "provider_main" {
  profile = "external"
  name    = "provider-main"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)
- `profile` (String)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `params` (Map of String)
- `password` (String, Sensitive)
- `proxy` (String)
- `realm` (String)
- `register` (Boolean)
- `updated_at` (String)
- `username` (String)
